title: PolicySet
description: A collection of DSL policies with interception point and tool scope bindings

aps_version.description: The APS specification version this policy set targets (e.g. '0.1.0').

policies.description: The list of policies in this set

PolicyEntry.title: PolicyEntry
PolicyEntry.description: A DSL policy rule with optional scope restrictions

action.description: The action to take when the condition matches

reason.description: Optional human-readable reason, typically used with deny

redactions.description: Redaction instructions to apply when action is 'redact'.

field.description: Dot-notation path to the field being redacted (e.g. 'response.content').

strategy.description: 'mask' replaces with a fixed string, 'remove' deletes the field, 'replace' substitutes matched patterns.

replacement.description: Replacement string. Required when strategy is 'mask' or 'replace'.

pattern.description: Regex pattern identifying the content to redact. Required when strategy is 'replace'.

transformation.description: Field transformations when action is 'transform'. Keys are dot-notation field paths, values are template strings supporting {{field.path}} interpolation.

applies_to.description: Interception points this policy applies to. Omit to apply to all points.

tools.description: Tool names this policy applies to. Only evaluated when applies_to includes 'tool_call'. Omit to apply to all tools.

Condition.description: A condition evaluated against the context

EqualsCondition.description: Matches when the resolved field value strictly equals the operand

field.description: Dot-notation path to the field in the context (e.g. 'tool_name', 'messages.0.content')

equals.description: The value to compare against using strict equality

ContainsCondition.description: Matches when the resolved field value contains any of the given substrings (case-insensitive)

NotInCondition.description: Matches when the resolved field value is not present in the given list

not_in.description: List of values the field must not be equal to

GreaterThanCondition.description: Matches when the resolved field value is numerically greater than the operand
